description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a highly stylized and abstract form, featuring elongated limbs and a narrow, angular torso. The figure appears to be in a dynamic walking pose, with one leg extended forward and the other trailing behind, suggesting movement. The arms are also elongated and positioned in a natural walking swing, with one arm slightly bent and the other more extended. The surface is smooth and reflective, giving the figure a sleek, modern appearance. The overall silhouette is slender, with exaggerated proportions that emphasize height and motion. There are no visible facial features or detailed anatomical elements, reinforcing the abstract and artistic interpretation of a walking adult.
description: A highly stylized, elongated adult pedestrian figure in a dynamic walking pose with smooth, reflective surfaces and abstract proportions.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow torso, elongated legs, and arms, with the figure's stride and upright posture most apparent.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extended stride, with one leg forward and the other back, and the arm swing visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the torso and the trailing leg, emphasizing the figure's slim profile and dynamic pose.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the stride and arm swing, showing the other leg extended and the overall angular form.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract bodysuit with no discernible garment details
attribute_hairstyle: featureless head with no visible hair
